title: IPO Readiness Investor Update
subtitle: Illustrative equity story and readiness deck generated with IBDeck

slides.title: IPO Readiness Investor Update
slides.subtitle: Equity story, financial profile, and readiness priorities

slides.title: Company is approaching IPO readiness, but margin consistency and reporting maturity remain gating items
bullets: Revenue scale and category leadership are sufficient to support early investor education.
Gross margin and retention trajectory provide credible evidence for long-term model quality.
Public-company readiness should focus on forecasting cadence, KPI definitions, and control maturity.
Optimal timeline depends on two additional quarters of predictable growth and improved cash conversion.

slides.title: Equity story should anchor on category leadership while directly addressing profitability questions

columns.heading: Investor positives
bullets: Large addressable market with structural demand tailwinds
Recurring revenue model with improving retention
Clear path to margin expansion through operating leverage
Experienced management team and scalable platform

columns.heading: Likely investor questions
bullets: Durability of growth as company scales
Timing of sustainable free cash flow
Quality and consistency of KPI reporting

slides.title: Illustrative forecast shows transition from growth investment to balanced growth and margin expansion
slides.source: Note: Illustrative forecast. Source: IBDeck analysis.

slides.title: IPO preparation should run as a 3-phase readiness program before formal launch

phases.name: Launch-ready
items: Begin investor education when market window supports
